description_long: This is a round ceramic plate with a slightly raised rim, featuring two pieces of open-faced toast topped with a variety of fresh ingredients. One toast appears to be topped with avocado, sliced radishes, and cherry tomatoes, while the other is garnished with smoked salmon, capers, and microgreens. The plate is accompanied by a neatly rolled cloth napkin placed beside it. The plate has a matte, off-white surface with a darker rim, giving it a modern, artisanal appearance. The food presentation is colorful and visually appealing, with vibrant greens, reds, and pinks contrasting against the neutral plate. The overall setup suggests a meal ready to be served, likely in a café or urban dining setting.
description: A round ceramic plate with two pieces of gourmet toast, topped with avocado, radishes, smoked salmon, and microgreens, accompanied by a rolled cloth napkin. The plate has a matte off-white finish with a dark rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plate with both toasts clearly visible and the napkin placed in front.
description_view_1: Side view with the napkin to the left and a clear view of the toast toppings, especially the radishes and salmon.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with the napkin behind the plate, highlighting the colorful toppings on both toasts.
description_view_3: Angled view with the napkin to the right, showing the plate's rim and the arrangement of the food.
attribute_surrounding_context: A rolled cloth napkin is placed adjacent to the plate.
